testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.auth.jwt.JwtAccessDeniedHandlerTest

testcase.name: handle emits JSON 403 with stable error envelope()
handle is a no-op when the response is already committed()

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-02T23:50:28.802+09:00 DEBUG 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.auth.jwt.JwtAccessDeniedHandler : Forbidden request rejected path=/api/admin/secret reason=Access is denied (rule: hasRole('ADMIN')) 2026-05-02T23:50:28.804+09:00 DEBUG 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.auth.jwt.JwtAccessDeniedHandler : Forbidden request rejected path=/api/admin/secret reason=anything 2026-05-02T23:50:28.804+09:00 DEBUG 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.auth.jwt.JwtAccessDeniedHandler : Response already committed; skipping JSON 403 body for path=/api/admin/secret
